overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an astronaut in a spacesuit exploring a dark, fog-filled sci-fi spaceship corridor illuminated by red emergency lights. The environment features alien organic growths along the walls as the character approaches and examines a broken door barricade.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial spaceship corridor with alien biomass infestation

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the fog-filled corridor in a spacesuit, passing vending machines and organic growths on the right

entered.detail: large pulsating organic biomass with red veins attached to the corridor wall
dark metallic industrial walls with paneling and pipes
red warning lights illuminating the ceiling and upper walls
illuminated vending machine with colorful display on the left wall
large circular metal door with glowing center light at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view following an astronaut walking through a narrow, fog-filled spaceship corridor. Red emergency lights cast an ominous glow on the industrial metal walls. Large organic alien growths are visible on the right wall, while a vending machine sits on the left. The character moves steadily toward a circular airlock door visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: damaged corridor section with broken door barricade

events.description: approaching broken door barricade with twisted metal and debris blocking the path
character stops briefly to examine the broken door structure before moving past it

agents.ego_description: approaching the damaged door, pausing to look at the destruction, then carefully moving past the debris

entered.detail: twisted metal door frame with broken bars and debris blocking the corridor
scattered metal debris and broken pieces on the floor near the door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a broken door barricade that blocks the corridor, with twisted metal and debris scattered around. The astronaut stops briefly to examine the damage before proceeding past it. The organic growths remain visible on the right side, now closer to the camera, while red warning lights continue to illuminate the damaged section of the ship.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic spaceship corridor that transitions from a steady walk into a close examination of a wreckage site. It begins by following an astronaut through a narrow, fog-filled hallway where red emergency lights cast an ominous glow over industrial metal walls and a lone vending machine. As the character moves forward, the camera draws closer to large organic alien growths clinging to the right wall while maintaining focus on a distant circular airlock door. The scene then shifts as the astronaut reaches a broken door barricade, moving through a field of twisted metal and scattered debris. Finally, the camera slows as the character stops to examine the damage under the pulsing red warning lights before proceeding past the wreckage.
